terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.acceptanceBody: By accessing or using the DittoDatto platform ("Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use the Service.
terms.serviceDescriptionBody: DittoDatto is a local marketplace platform that connects consumers with businesses in Drammen and surrounding areas. The Service enables users to discover, browse, and book services from local establishments including restaurants, service providers, and venues.
terms.userAccountsBody: To access certain features, you may need to create an account. You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials and for all activities under your account. You must provide accurate and complete information during registration.
terms.bookingsBody: When you make a booking through DittoDatto, you enter into an agreement with the service provider. DittoDatto facilitates the booking process but is not a party to the agreement between you and the service provider. Cancellation policies are set by individual businesses.
terms.intellectualPropertyBody: All content, features, and functionality of the Service — including text, graphics, logos, and software — are owned by DittoDatto or its licensors and are protected by applicable intellectual property laws.
terms.liabilityBody: DittoDatto provides the Service on an "as is" basis. We do not guarantee the accuracy of information provided by businesses on the platform. To the fullest extent permitted by law, DittoDatto shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages.
terms.governingLawBody: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Norway. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Drammen, Norway.
terms.contactBody: If you have questions about these Terms, please contact us at {link}.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.dataCollectionBody: We collect information you provide directly, such as your name, email address, and phone number when you create an account. We also collect usage data including pages visited, features used, and booking history to improve the Service.
privacy.howWeUseBody: Your data is used to provide and improve the DittoDatto platform, process bookings, communicate with you about your account and bookings, and personalize your experience. We do not sell your personal information to third parties.
privacy.dataSharingBody: We share your information with service providers only as necessary to fulfill bookings. We may also share data with payment processors, analytics providers, and as required by Norwegian law.
privacy.dataStorageBody: Your data is stored securely using Google Cloud Platform infrastructure within the European Economic Area (EEA). We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data.
privacy.yourRightsBody: Under GDPR and Norwegian data protection law, you have the right to access, correct, delete, and port your personal data. You may also object to processing and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us through our {link}.
privacy.cookiesBody: We use cookies and similar technologies to maintain your session, remember preferences, and analyze usage patterns. For more details, see our {link}.
privacy.changesBody: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of significant changes via email or a prominent notice on the platform.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.whatAreCookiesBody: Cookies are small text files stored on your device when you visit a website. They help the site remember your preferences and understand how you interact with the platform.
cookies.howWeUseIntro: DittoDatto uses cookies for the following purposes:
cookies.essentialDesc: Required for the platform to function. These manage your login session, security tokens, and language preferences.
cookies.functionalDesc: Remember your choices such as theme preference (light/dark/solar mode) and recently viewed businesses.
cookies.analyticsDesc: Help us understand how visitors use the platform so we can improve the experience. Data is anonymized.
cookies.thirdPartyIntro: We use the following third-party services that may set cookies:
cookies.managingBody: You can control cookies through your browser settings. Most browsers allow you to block or delete cookies. However, blocking essential cookies may prevent parts of the platform from functioning correctly.
cookies.moreInfoBody: For questions about our cookie practices, please visit our {privacyLink} or reach out via our {contactLink}.

about.title: About DittoDatto
about.subtitle: Connecting you with the best local businesses in Drammen and beyond.
about.missionBody1: DittoDatto was born from a simple idea: every local business deserves a digital storefront that's as welcoming as walking through their door. We're building the bridge between Drammen's vibrant business community and the people who live here.
about.missionBody2: Whether it's booking a haircut, reserving a table, or discovering a new fitness studio — DittoDatto makes it seamless.
about.visionBody1: We envision a platform where every local service is just one tap away. A place where small businesses thrive alongside the big players, and where customers always find exactly what they need — right in their neighborhood.
about.visionBody2: DittoDatto is proudly built in Drammen, Norway, by Merkurial Studio.
about.value1Desc: We believe in strengthening local communities by making every neighborhood business discoverable.
about.value2Desc: Honest reviews, real availability, and no hidden fees. What you see is what you get.
about.value3Desc: Booking a service should be as easy as sending a message. We remove the friction.
about.ctaDesc: Join thousands of people discovering local businesses on DittoDatto.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have a question, feedback, or just want to say hello? We'd love to hear from you.
contact.successDesc: Thanks for reaching out. We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
contact.responseTimeDesc: We typically respond within 24/7 business days.
contact.businessInquiryDesc: Want to list your business on DittoDatto?

forBusiness.title: Grow Your Business with DittoDatto
forBusiness.subtitle: List your business, manage bookings, and reach thousands of local customers — all in one place.
forBusiness.feature1Desc: Let customers book your services 24/7 with our integrated booking system.
forBusiness.feature2Desc: Get discovered by thousands of people searching for services in your area.
forBusiness.feature3Desc: Track your bookings, views, and customer engagement with detailed analytics.
forBusiness.feature4Desc: Your business profile looks great on every device — phone, tablet, or desktop.
forBusiness.ctaDesc: Join the growing community of businesses on DittoDatto. Setup takes just a few minutes.

form.title: Interested? Get in touch
form.subtitle: Tell us about your business and we will reach out to help you get started.
form.descriptionPlaceholder: What services do you offer? How many staff members?
form.successDesc: Thanks for your interest! We will be in touch within 1-2 business days.

notifications.messagesComingSoonDesc: Soon you'll be able to chat directly with businesses about your bookings and appointments.
notifications.archivedEmptyDesc: Notifications you archive will appear here.
